title: Brand New G.Skill Trident Z5 RGB CL36 6000mhz 64gb (2x32) DDR5 Ram
description: Details Condition: New Brand: G.Skill Description White G.Skill Trident Z5 RGB 64GB DDR5 RAM for sale. Specs: 64GB total (2x32GB) CL36 6000MHz AMD EXPO + XMP profiles $970 for the kit. Price is fairly firm as it’s already a strong deal for 64GB 6000MHz CL36 but still open to reasonable offers. Afterpay available on request. For comparison, the 32GB (2x16GB) Trident Z5 kit is around $1100 at PB Tech and other 64GB kits are $1700-$2200, so this is a solid deal for a full 64GB 6000MHz CL36 kit. Brand new but tested - ran MemTest with no errors or issues at 6000MHz CL36 with EXPO enabled. These also have XMP profiles as they’re dual profile RAM kits, so they can be used with both AMD and Intel motherboards. Pickup or drop off preferred, but I can ship anywhere in NZ.
